title: GroupMembership
description: Contains the identifiers for a group, a group member, and a GroupMembership object in the identity store.

allOf.description: The globally unique identifier for the identity store.
The identifier for a GroupMembership object in an identity store.
The identifier for a group in the identity store.
An object that contains the identifier of a group member. Setting the UserID field to the specific identifier for a user indicates that the user is a member of the group.
